spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Utilitarian density. The UI must feel like a precision instrument or control room. Sharp edges, strict grids, and optical clarity.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Control Room style). gap-4 to gap-6. Direct children only.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) - NO large radii.

components.header: Sticky header, z-50. bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-900. Must include Logo, Nav links, and WhatsApp CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:border-red-600 hover:text-red-500 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors

components.cards: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors p-6 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden group.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components. input/textarea: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-500 rounded-none. Muted backgrounds for autofill.

image_urls.description: Modern server room with blue illumination.
Two surveillance cameras on a pole.
Close up of a camera on a table.

key_sections: Marquee (Stats: 24/7 Monitoring, PSIRA Certified, 99.9% Uptime, Rapid Response)
Quote Form (Minimal fields: Name, Email, Phone, Service, Message)

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: High contrast shifts. Text colors change to white, borders change to red-600.
interaction_and_motion.animations: Subtle and mechanical. Use framer-motion for simple opacity fades. No bouncy animations.
interaction_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure all form fields have labels (can be floating or above) and data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Implement a strict DARK MODE ONLY design (modify tailwind.config.js and globals.css to enforce dark mode backgrounds natively: body { @apply bg-black text-white; }).
2. Do not use border-radius larger than 2px (rounded-sm or rounded-none). The UI must feel sharp, tactical, and precise.
4. Add this to public/index.html head for Cabinet Grotesk: <link href='https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,900,400&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
5. Use Google Fonts for IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono.
6. Build the Services section as a tactical Bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4) with 1px zinc-800 borders.
7. The Hero section must use the server room image as a background WITH a heavy bg-black/80 overlay so text is highly readable. Use grid backgrounds or noise textures for extra tactical feel.
8. Implement a Floating WhatsApp button (fixed bottom-right, z-50, green color is acceptable here or match brand).
9. All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-quote-button').

10. Connect the Quote Form using the provided Resend backend structure (use standard secure form practices, include an anti-spam copy like 'Secure 256-bit encrypted submission' near the submit button).
